response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software engineering experience with strong leadership in open-source projects and AI-agent infrastructure, aligning well with AI strategy and cloud expertise. However, his background lacks direct AI product development or recognized expertise in AI (e.g., publications, patents), and his entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is niche. His technical depth in systems and languages is evident, but the role requires more explicit AI leadership and strategic customer advisory experience.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective, demonstrating technical innovation and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: Limited explicit AI product development or platform building experience in a commercial/strategic context
No Master's/PhD in AI-related field or recognized AI expertise (e.g., patents, high-impact publications)
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is niche and may not translate to large-scale AI/cloud strategy roles
